math_recheck: Re-derived/computationally verified: closed-form e(T(n,r))=(1-1/r)(n^2-s^2)/2+C(s,2) (exact, 0 mismatches to n=40) and floor form for r<=7 (fails r=8, correctly caveated); Case-1 clone delta=d(v)-d(u) and Case-2 double-clone delta=2d(u)-(d(v)-d(w)-1)=2d(u)-d(v)-d(w)+1 both verified exact on explicit graphs incl. the +1 from edge vw and K_{r+1}-preservation; uniqueness of Turan extremizer up to iso brute-forced for all small (n,r); both baseline bounds (Caro-Wei probabilistic n^2<=r(n^2-2|E|), Motzkin-Straus f=(1/2)(1-1/k)) and Mantel d(u)+d(v)<=n re-derived and sampled; theorem chain e(G)<=e(T(n,r))<=(1-1/r)n^2/2 and r=2->floor(n^2/4) confirmed; answer.md verification script runs with all assertions passing.
